name: Volati AB
summary: Volati AB is an industrial investment group, specializing in buyouts, add on acquisitions in mature and middle market companies. The group invests primarily in Trading, Consumer and Industry sectors. Within trading it invests in building materials sector, consumables and material for construction, home and garden, and agriculture and forestry farmers. Within consumer, it invest in database marketing, digitization and e-commerce. Within industry it invest in international expansion, lean manufacturing and HR. It prefers to invest in small to medium sized Nordic, European, companies mainly in Sweden. The firm invests between SEK 10 million ($1.09 million) and SEK 200 million ($21.94million) in companies with enterprise values between SEK 50 million ($5.48 million) and SEK 1000 million ($109.71 million), revenues between SEK 25 million ($2.74 million) and SEK 500 million ($54.85 million), net operating income exceeding SEK5 million ($ 0.55 million), and EBITDA between SEK20 million ($2.19 million) and SEK 200million ($21.94 million). It seeks majority/ownership control and prefers to invest in companies with strong cash flows and take a board seat in its portfolio companies. The firm invests out of balance sheet. Volati AB was founded in 2003 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden with additional offices across Europe.
